overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a moonlit waterfront city with stone architecture, braziers, and statues. An eagle companion lands on the character's arm as they explore the historic environment with obelisks and marble sculptures.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront terrace with braziers overlooking harbor

events.description: eagle descends from the night sky toward the character
eagle lands on character's left arm and perches there

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs from a terrace overlooking the harbor while an eagle flies down and lands on her arm

notable_agents.action: large eagle landing on the character's arm and perching there

entered.detail: raised stone platform with geometric tile patterns overlooking the water
large metal bowls with bright orange flames on tripods
calm dark water reflecting moonlight and distant city lights
distant buildings with lit windows along the waterfront
tall white marble statue of a robed figure on a pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character descends a stone terrace overlooking a moonlit harbor, with burning braziers illuminating the geometric tile patterns. An eagle swoops down from the night sky and lands on her arm as she walks toward the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central obelisk and surrounding statues

events.description: character turns left and continues walking past the obelisk
character passes close to the obelisk, temporarily blocking the view of the plaza beyond

agents.ego_description: walking through a plaza with a tall obelisk, passing other pedestrians and guards

notable_agents.action: guard in red tunic walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall golden-tipped stone obelisk with hieroglyphic carvings
stone buildings with columns and red-tiled roofs
tall dark green trees lining the plaza

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open plaza dominated by a tall golden obelisk, the character passes marble statues and ancient buildings with red-tiled roofs. Other pedestrians and guards move through the torch-lit square as the character navigates around the monument.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden walkway with trimmed hedges and flower beds

events.description: moving from open plaza to narrower garden path with buildings closer on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along a stone path bordered by hedges and ancient buildings

entered.detail: neatly trimmed green hedges lining the path
red flowers planted along the building foundation
irregular stone paving stones forming the walkway

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a garden walkway lined with trimmed hedges and flower beds alongside stone buildings. The character moves along the cobblestone path, passing from the open plaza into a more enclosed corridor with vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace with large warrior statue and columned structures

events.description: approaching a large warrior statue with spear and shield becomes the focal point

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large warrior statue on an open terrace with views of the harbor

notable_agents.action: guard walking ahead toward the warrior statue

entered.detail: large white marble statue of a warrior with spear and shield
structure with stone columns and statues on the roof
water visible again in the distance beyond the terrace

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto another open terrace, the character approaches a massive warrior statue holding a spear and shield. The path leads toward a columned pavilion with statues on its roof, while the harbor becomes visible again in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit harbor terrace through a bustling ancient plaza and into a secluded garden before returning to an open overlook. It begins as the character descends a stone terrace illuminated by burning braziers, where an eagle swoops from the night sky to land on her arm. As she moves forward, the scene expands into a wide, torch-lit plaza dominated by a towering golden obelisk and marble statues, with pedestrians and guards navigating the square. The path then narrows, shifting from the open monument into an enclosed garden walkway lined with trimmed hedges and flower beds. Finally, the camera emerges onto another terrace, passing a massive warrior statue and a columned pavilion as the harbor reappears in the distance.
